title: 3 Defense Equipment Stocks to Buy Amid Improved Air Traffic View
text: Factors like recovering revenue per kilometer and strategic mergers are projected to boost aerospace-defense equipment stocks' growth, despite supply chain issues. You may buy TDG, CW & DCO

title: 5 High-Performing Stocks Ron Baron and Daniel Loeb Both Own
text: According to the All-in-One Screener, a Premium feature of GuruFocus, five stocks that Ron Baron (Trades, Portfolio) and Daniel Loeb (Trades, Portfolio) both agree on and have outperformed the Standard & Poor's 500 index over the past three months are UnitedHealth Group Inc. ( UNH , Financial), Danaher Corp. ( DHR , Financial), TransDigm Group Inc. ( TDG , Financial), Membership Collective Group Inc. ( MCG , Financial) and ION Acquisition Corp. 3 Ltd. ( IACC , Financial).
